calendar.matters:
Order To Show Cause Re: Why An Order For Sale Of A Dwelling Should Not Issue
Off Calendar Nov-18-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Plaintiff Brett A. Pedersen's Order To Show Cause Re: Why An Order For Sale Of A Dwelling Should Not Issue.
APPEARANCES: Jorge Berrospi 759-1448 deft & opposing party in propria persona (did not comply with the tentative ruling rule re giving proper notice to opposing party of his intent to appear at the hearing); no other appearances.
RULING: The Court denied defendant's request for a continuance and adopted its tentative ruling - granted. No opposition filed. (302/PJM) Judge: Patrick J. Mahoney, Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR 8600
